layout.withCharacter: full-bleed cinematic background, text blocks 55-60% on one side, character 40-45% on opposite side
layout.withoutCharacter: same geometry as with-character, but the character side 40-45% must remain empty background zone

template.topBar: dark charcoal bar near top, white uppercase context text, spanning 70-100% width
template.mainBlock: bright yellow rectangular hook block with ultra-bold black condensed uppercase text
template.bottomBar: red urgency strip with white uppercase CTA text attached under hook block
template.icon: single circular support icon with white ring near the lower junction of text blocks
